---
title: Fragmentation Field Model
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
jupyter: python3
---

## Sources

Sources collected in `doc-reference/` and used in deriving this model:

| File                                                             | Source                                                                                                         |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fragmentation/gurney-equations-fragmentation/rspa.1947.0042.md` | Mott (1947) "Fragmentation of shell cases", *Proc. Roy. Soc. A* 189 — distribution law and γ calibration table |
| `fragmentation/fragment-size-distribution-conwep/…`              | Gold (2017) PAFRAG fragment size model — eq. (16) for μ; 3× expansion rule of thumb                            |
| `fragmentation/explosion-fragment-model/…`                       | Felix, Colwill & Harris (2022) *Defence Technology* — fragment shape, aspect ratio, and air resistance         |
| `fragmentation/ada462991-fragment-velocity/ADA462991.md`         | Gold (2007) PAFRAG engineering model — velocity distribution vs. spray angle                                   |
| `wound-ballistics/fas-es310-damage-criteria/…`                   | FAS/Navy (1998) ES-310 — Pk\|hit anchors and multi-hit formula                                                 |

______________________________________________________________________

{{< include _background.qmd >}}

{{< include _governing-equations.qmd >}}

{{< include _parameters.qmd >}}

{{< include _implementation.qmd >}}

{{< include _validation.qmd >}}

{{< include _field-plots.qmd >}}

{{< include _four-zone-3d.qmd >}}

{{< include _change-log.qmd >}}

{{< include _limitations.qmd >}}
